data_notes: 91+ day auction tail RECONCILED 2026-07-19 to the NSS Delinquency Report (Travis-approved): tail/buckets now come from delinquent_leases (per-lease days_late/$) via delinquency_query.site_aging(), NOT facility_day Hummingbird unit buckets. tail_units = delinquent leases with days_late >= 90 (the report's auction_tail edge); the site and the report now show the SAME tail.
Tail trend tracks the delinquent_leases snapshot history, which begins 2026-07-18 (the series restarted from that source on reconciliation; it deepens daily with the ingest).

Net move-ins (league + current-month trend point) RECONCILED 2026-07-19 to Nectar's own MTD counter (facility_day.net_move_ins_mtd_msr) via portfolio_query.move_activity_mtd_msr() — the same source the weekly MTD PDF and travismorrow.com/portfolio KPI tiles use — replacing the daily-sum (which ran a few units low). Stays offline (read from the store the daily ingest populates).
Monthly trend series come from the validated EOM MSR history cache (May 2025 onward); the newest point is the OPEN month (partial=true), month-to-date as of generated_at.
ROAS uses the latest closed ad-spend month; facilities with no paid campaigns show null, never a fabricated 0.
Auction-watch goal: 2 units portfolio-wide (Travis's operational target for the 91+ tail).
